allow:
Bash(git add lib/features/chat/screens/chat_screen.dart lib/features/discovery/bloc/discovery_bloc.dart lib/features/discovery/bloc/discovery_event.dart lib/features/discovery/bloc/discovery_state.dart lib/features/discovery/screens/discovery_screen.dart lib/features/discovery/screens/peer_detail_screen.dart lib/features/discovery/widgets/peer_grid_tile.dart lib/features/onboarding/screens/onboarding_screen.dart lib/injection.dart lib/services/ble/ble_config.dart lib/services/ble/flutter_blue_plus_ble_service.dart && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Improve UX for cruise/festival high-density BLE mesh

Item 1 – Profile photos gated for relayed peers: show "Get closer to
see photos" placeholder in both grid tile and detail screen; only show
thumbnail if ≤20 KB.

Item 2 – Block photo sending to relayed peers: photo button shows
"Move closer to send photos" snackbar instead of bottom sheet.

Item 3 – Adaptive scanning & probabilistic relay: scan cadence
auto-switches to battery-saver timing above 15 direct peers; relay
floods drop to 65% probability in high-density mode; explicit battery-
saver toggle preserved independently via _explicitBatterySaver.
BleConfig gains highDensityPeerThreshold, highDensityScanPause,
normalScanPause, highDensityRelayProbability fields.

Item 4 – iOS background tip: 4th onboarding page "Keep Anchor Open"
explains iOS BLE background limits; DiscoveryBloc wired to
NotificationService to fire peer-discovered notification for background
awareness.

Item 5 – "X nearby · Y via mesh" indicator in Discovery AppBar
replaces plain peer count badge.

Item 6 – Hop count in chat AppBar: "Via relay · N hops" subtitle;
hopCount threaded from BLE model → PeerDiscovered event →
DiscoveredPeer UI model → PeerDetailScreen → ChatScreen.

Item 7 – No relay queuing: clarifying doc comment added to
_maybeRelayMessage confirming relay is forward-only to currently
connected peers.

Item 8 – Realistic range badges: grid tile shows "Close / Nearby /
In range / Via mesh" label based on RSSI; dismissable mesh tip card
appears in Discovery grid when relayed peers are present.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
